positive: A stylized, vibrant, symmetrical illustration of a crescent moon cradling a constellation of stylized geometric animals (e.g., fox, owl, bear, rabbit). The design should be rendered in a cohesive, minimalist graphic style, using deep cosmic blues, electric teals, starry golds, and crisp whites. The composition should be centrally focused, with strong, easily identifiable silhouettes against negative space. Style: Modern folklore graphic design, neo-Art Deco influence, vector illustration quality. Lighting: Flat, graphic contrast lighting, high contrast edges. Ideal for apparel print, scalable, clean lines, symmetrical.
negative: text, logo, watermark, signature, blur, deformed, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noisy, grainy, low contrast, photorealism, sketch, messy, low resolution
